    • getCapacityChipLabel

      @NonNull public static String getCapacityChipLabel(@NonNull Event event)
      Returns a short capacity chip label for event cards. Shows "X/Y" where X is the lottery sample size and Y is the total waiting list capacity, or just "Y seats" when sample size equals capacity or is not set.
